final_prompt.prompt:
Create a photorealistic product shot of a sapphire ring with diamond pavé setting on black velvet.

Style/medium: photorealistic jewelry photography, macro product shot with focus stacking
Composition: tight macro framing, 90mm macro lens, shallow depth isolating the stone, 45-degree angle showing pavilion and crown
Subject: round-cut deep blue sapphire with visible internal fire and dispersion, brilliant-cut diamond halo and band pavé, platinum or white gold setting
Scene/backdrop: seamless black velvet surface, no visible seams or texture beyond the fabric's natural nap
Lighting/mood: controlled studio lighting with pinpoint highlights to create fire and scintillation inside the sapphire, subtle rim light defining metal edges
Color palette: saturated royal blue as anchor, white diamond sparkle as accent, deep black velvet as negative space
Materials/textures: glass-like sapphire clarity with internal refraction, faceted diamond surfaces, soft matte velvet nap, polished mirror-finish metal
Avoid: cartoonish gem rendering, plastic-looking stones, oversaturated colors, visible dust, harsh reflections, 8K stuffer labels
